info.title: Midjourney generation
info.description: API reference for Midjourney generation on Ace Data Cloud.

actions.description: List of allowed actions that can be performed on the generated image.

success.description: Indicates if the task was successful executed.

task_id.description: The ID of the imagine task.

image_id.description: The unique identifier of the generated image.

image_url.description: The URL of the generated thumbnail image, if you want to get the raw image use the raw_image_url field.

image_width.description: The width of the generated thumbnail image.

image_height.description: The height of the generated thumbnail image.

raw_image_url.description: The raw URL of the generated raw image.

raw_image_width.description: The height of the generated raw image.

raw_image_height.description: The height of the generated raw image.

200.description: Image generated successfully or operation performed successfully.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

mask.description: Mask image URL for the operation, it can be used for specific action - variation_region

mode.description: The mode of the API. It can be 'fast', 'relax' or 'turbo', which corresponds to different mode of Midjourney.

action.description: Operation type. Use 'generate' for the first time and actions values for subsequent operations, and you can specify specific action to perform on the generated image.

prompt.example: A cat sitting on a table
prompt.description: Image description in English for generating the preview image.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for the API to return data.

image_id.description: Image ID for continue operations on an already generated image.

translation.description: Enable automatic translation for non-English prompts, because Midjourney only supports English officially.

callback_url.description: Webhook callback URL for asynchronous notifications.

split_images.description: Split the generated image into multiple images, return by sub_image_urls field. By default, it is false.

version.description: Midjourney model version to use, e.g. '8', '7', '6.1'. Used for billing calculation of version-specific features.

hd.description: Enable HD image generation (2K resolution, V8 only). Costs 4x GPU time compared to regular images.

quality.description: Quality level for image generation. Values: '.25', '.5', '1', '2', '4'. Quality '4' is V8 only and costs 4x GPU time.

style_reference.description: Whether the prompt uses style references (--sref). In V8, this costs 4x GPU time.

moodboard.description: Whether the prompt uses moodboard references. In V8, image references become moodboards and cost 4x GPU time.

mask.description: The mask position of the image area can be specified for editing and re-generation.

mode.description: The default speed mode for image editing tasks is fast.

callback_url.description: Webhook callback URL for asynchronous notifications.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

action.description: Operation type. Use 'generate' to create a new video from a first-frame image (image_url is required); use 'extend' to extend an existing generated video (video_id is required).

mode.description: The default speed mode for video generation tasks is fast.

resolution.description: The default video clarity for generating video tasks is 720p.

prompt.example: A cat sitting on a table
prompt.description: Generate prompt words for video tasks.

video_id.description: When expanding the video, the specified video_id is required.

video_index.description: When expanding, it is also necessary to specify the indexes of four videos, with the indexes starting from 0.

loop.description: Whether to generate a looping video, the default is false.

image_url.description: The link to the first-frame reference image when generating the video. Required when action is 'generate' (Midjourney video generation is image-to-video only and does not support pure text-to-video).

end_image_url.description: Specify the image to generate the end frame of the video.

callback_url.description: Webhook callback URL for asynchronous notifications.

descriptions: a gold sailboat on the ocean with lots of coins on it, in the style of stark visuals, animated gifs, flowing silhouettes, provia, personal iconography, ramses younan, firecore --ar 75:3

the sailboat sails through a cluster of gold coins, in the style of chillwave, flowing silhouettes, tenebrism mastery, narrative-driven visual storytelling, sketchfab, havencore, creative commons attribution --ar 75:3
an image of a boat sailing through gold coins, in the style of sketchfab, flowing silhouettes, 32k uhd, martiros saryan, reefwave, personal iconography, animated gifs --ar 75:3
a boat floating in waters of gold coin bubbles, in the style of stark visuals, hand-drawn animation, scoutcore, hurufiyya, sketchfab, luminous shadows, money themed --ar 75:3

descriptions.description: The generated descriptions for the image.

prompt.description: The prompt to analyze and shorten. Midjourney's prompt analyzer reads the prompt, highlights the highest-weighted tokens and produces 5 shortened candidate prompts that preserve the dominant ideas.

parameters.name: accept
parameters.description: Specifies the format of the response from the server.

action.description: Operation type. Use `retrieve` to get a single task by `id` or `trace_id`, and `retrieve_batch` to get multiple tasks.

id.description: The task ID to retrieve. Used when `action` is `retrieve`.

trace_id.description: The trace ID to retrieve. Used when `action` is `retrieve`.

ids.description: Task IDs for batch retrieval. Used when `action` is `retrieve_batch`.

trace_ids.description: Trace IDs for batch retrieval. Used when `action` is `retrieve_batch`.

offset.description: Offset for pagination. Used when `action` is `retrieve_batch`.

limit.description: Maximum number of tasks to return. Used when `action` is `retrieve_batch`.
